name: momo-paper-render
description: Render a Momo Paper document from structured JSON data to HTML. Supports 14 document types including equity reports, one-pagers, long docs, letters, portfolios, resumes, changelogs, process flows, timelines, FAQ pages, case studies, research summaries, stats reports, and infographics. Each document type has a JSON Schema defining its data structure. The engine applies design tokens (colors, typography, spacing) automatically and renders clean, print-safe HTML.

data.description: Path to the JSON data file containing the document content

output.description: Path where the rendered HTML file will be written

template.description: Optional explicit template file (overrides document_type mapping)

input_schema.description: All document types share a common top-level structure

sections.description: Document-specific sections. See schema files in json-engine/schemas/

chart_support.description: Embed charts by adding a 'chart' object within any section

locale_behavior.description: Templates automatically switch section titles and labels based on the 'locale' field. zh-CN uses Chinese headings, en uses English headings. No separate template needed.
